name: confidence-aware per-note output

per_note_conf_vs_in_gt_abs_r.note: Vocadito 10-clip subset, mir_eval transcription match with onset_tol=50ms pitch_tol=50c

global_conf_vs_mv2h_abs_r.metric: median beat-strength aggregate vs ASAP MV2H

discard_rationale: Per-note aggregation (mean PESTO conf * mean CREPE periodicity * beat strength at onset) is too coarse a signal on Vocadito monophonic humming. PESTO/CREPE confidence is uniformly high on voiced frames; beat strength dominates but Vocadito's humming beats are weak signals themselves. Net per-note |r| = 0.118 and lowest-20% only recovers 24.4% of false positives, both well below strict thresholds. The aggregation API is shipped at humscribe/eval/confidence.py for future Phase H work using per-token YMT3 logits.
